findings.issue: Blocker #15 (Open Badges 3.0 VC compliance) marked as 🟥 ready to build — implementation missing DID issuer, cryptographic proofs, revocation endpoint
findings.recommended_fix: Build Open Badges 3.0 integration with cryptographic signing and DID-based issuance; use existing schema/transformer files

findings.issue: Blocker #16 (MIRT upgrade) marked as 🟥 — still using 8 independent 3PL models, not unified multidimensional IRT
findings.recommended_fix: Upgrade assessment engine to MIRT model to improve score accuracy and cross-competency correlation

findings.issue: Law 2 not enforced in 4/5 products despite being Foundation Law — Energy Picker only in VOLAURA
findings.recommended_fix: Extend Energy Mode (Full/Mid/Low) to MindShift, LifeSim, BrandedBy, ZEUS with `data-energy` attribute and adaptive UI

findings.issue: Blocker #15 (Open Badges 3.0 VC compliance) status is false. Partial implementation exists in `packages/badge_issuer/open_badges_3_0_` but lacks DID issuer, cryptographic proofs, revocation endpoint.
findings.recommended_fix: Complete Open Badges 3.0 VC compliance with full cryptographic signing, DID-based issuer identity, and revocation registry integration.

findings.issue: Blocker #16 (MIRT upgrade) status is false. System still uses 8 independent 3PL models; no multidimensional IRT integration.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement MIRT engine with unified latent trait model across 8 competencies, replacing standalone 3PL instances.

findings.issue: Unmitigated launch blocker: no rollback plan for database schema changes.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement versioned schema migrations with automated rollback scripts and pre-deployment impact analysis.

findings.issue: No explicit 'health data' classification or separate consent screen for energy/burnout data
findings.recommended_fix: Implement Art. 9 consent flow with explicit opt-in for health data collection

findings.issue: Truncated file reference suggests incomplete documentation of voice data handling
findings.recommended_fix: Complete and verify voice data disclosure documentation per GDPR requirements
